'''Qimtiq''' was a male [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] and proprietor of the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the [[Onderon Civil War]]. He was also the arranger of [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|races]].

He provided information to [[Meetra Surik]] about the murder of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sullio]]. She talked to the soldiers in charge of the investigation, and four of them were [[Bahima]], [[Nikko]], [[Panar]], and [[Kiph]]. He was in a good mood because the Civil War was a boon to his business. He did not care how the war ended, so long as the soldiers would come to his cantina.

{{Char-stub}}
